concerns.text: FR-002 mandates running DelTA on 'at least 500 examples' and failing if fewer are found. Tasks T012-T015 implement N=200 examples. There is no task to enforce the 500-example minimum or the failure condition, leaving the spec requirement unmet.

FR-005 and SC-001 require comparing results against a 'uniform-weight baseline' in addition to the random baseline. Task T026 implements the random baseline but lacks a specific task to generate or compare against the uniform-weight baseline.

SC-003 requires measuring total pipeline execution time against the 6-hour limit. Task T009 sets up logging for time, but no task explicitly implements the logic to measure, report, and fail the run if the 6-hour threshold is exceeded.

FR-002 specifies using 'Llama-3-8B' for the Oracle. Tasks T013 and T015 implement the Oracle using 'Phi-3-mini' (as per plan.md). There is no task to switch the model to Llama-3-8B or to justify the deviation, leaving the spec requirement unmet.
